TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Frank_Adonis, title = Frank_Adonis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frank_Adonis} }

S.FORM: Frank Adonis kawas tay 1935, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 10, Frank Adonis, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Frank Adonis kawas tay 1935, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 10, Frank Adonis, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *rank a*onis~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *rank a*onis~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
